block_03: How does it compare to other types of Options?
block_04: Simply put: it’s better. FX Options blends the familiar mechanics of Options with the unlimited possibilities that Forex has to offer. The result is dynamic currency trading with with virtually unlimited profitability.
block_06: It means there’s no cap on the return you can get from an FX Option position as long as the price continues to move in the direction you predicted during the option’s lifetime.
block_07: Can I actually get +400% of profit from a single position?
block_08: Absolutely. If you catch a trend early and place a position accordingly.
block_09: What’s the shortest expiration time for FX Options?
block_10: 60 seconds. But you can also choose longer expiration time frames if you’d like.
block_11: Not sure where to start with Fx Options?
block_12: Start by watching this video tutorial.
